lines.en_lit: GEMARA: What is Parva? Rav Yosef said: Parva sorcerer,
They spread a sheet of fine linen. What is different fine linen? Rav Kahana said: so that will be aware that the service of the day in fine linen.
In the morning, he would wear worth eighteen Does the tanna come to tell us the tally This teach us that not fashion less than these If one decreases of these raises of those we have no with it.
However, everyone, agrees that morning are superior From where do we Rav Huna, son of Rav Ilai, said the verse states: linen linen linen a linen choicest linen
